title: King of Ararat
materials: Natural wood veneer marquetry on birch panel
framed: Unframed — arrives ready to hang or frame
shipping: White-glove fine art courier, worldwide, fully insured in transit
story: A work rooted in memory and landscape. The mountain of Ararat — sacred to the Armenian people — gives this portrait its emotional register: ancient, immovable, sovereign. Deep wenge and zebrawood veneers anchor the composition while lighter amboyna pieces lift the face from the surrounding darkness. The grain direction of each piece was chosen deliberately, reinforcing the subject's weight and presence. No two grains align by accident. This is a portrait of someone who knows exactly where they come from.
